raw.title: Of Hidden Futures and Star-Shaped Worlds
raw.excerpt:
Writer and activist Lara-Lane Plambeck describes her efforts, along with the artist collective RE-PEAT, to create alternative maps and unearth more embedded ways of seeing and preserving endangered peatlands.

The post Of Hidden Futures and Star-Shaped Worlds appeared first on Dark Mountain.

llm_processed.summary: Exploring hidden futures and imagining worlds that challenge our dominant narratives, often through the lens of ecological collapse and its consequences.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This work enables a bridge between liminality and ecological restoration, revealing new paths for imagining desirable futures without assuming one particular model.
